message:
feat: add reapIdleDogs to daemon handler — kill stale tmux sessions and trim oversized pool

Idle dogs with live tmux sessions are now reaped after 1 hour of inactivity.
When the pool exceeds maxDogPoolSize (4), dogs idle for 4+ hours are removed
from the kennel entirely. Wired into handleDogs() between cleanupStuckDogs
and dispatchPlugins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
